title: Your child's education can help you save tax: Eligibility, rules, limits for school and hostel fee exemption
summary: Families can save on school fees through tax exemptions for education and hostel allowances from employers. Tuition fees may also also qualify for deductions under Section 80C. Here's everything you need to know about these tax benefits.

title: Income-tax returns: Filing tax as a senior citizen? Tax slab, rebate and marginal relief — here are key things to know
summary: Income-tax returns: The I-T department has released excel utility of its ITR-1 (Sahaj), ITR-2, ITR-3, and ITR-4 (Sugam) forms for AY27. Today we lay out the numbers and key things to know for senior and super senior citizens looking to file their returns.

title: Karnataka builder failed to give promised amenities for 6 years; RERA intervenes: What you can do if it happens to you
summary: A Bengaluru homebuyer has been waiting over six years for promised amenities after paying ₹40 lakh for an apartment. He approached Karnataka RERA for relief and partly won the case. Here's what you can do if it happens to you.

title: 8th pay commission to close job vacancies for consultant roles in August — Check eligibility, salary and other details
summary: 8th CPC: The 8th pay commission has invited eligible candidates to fill vacancies for consultant roles. Here are details on job openings, qualifications required, salary and the deadline for applications.

title: EPFO portal now offers two ways to transfer your PF balance after changing jobs — here's the entire process
summary: The EPFO member portal now allows salaried employees to transfer their EPF balance from previous employers to current ones more easily, aiming to reduce paperwork. Here's how the process works and what all you need to know.

title: DA hike: Amid expectations of dearness allowance increase in July, here's a look at the past announcements
summary: DA hike: Amid expectations that the Indian government will announce dearness allowance increase in July 2026. we take a look at the trend of past DA hike announcements during the 7th central pay commission.

title: ITR filing 2026: If your income exceeds ₹1 crore, this disclosure is mandatory
summary: Taxpayers earning over ₹1 crore must file additional disclosures about assets and liabilities under Schedule AL when submitting their income tax returns. Details here.

title: Pension rules: Orissa HC says government employees can't lose pension over leave alone
summary: The Orissa High Court has ruled that unauthorised absence from work, by itself, is not grave misconduct that justifies compulsory retirement or denial of pension. The court restored a railway employee's retirement benefits after finding the punishment disproportionate.

title: Nasdaq 100 tops 20-year returns at 21%; Nifty Midcap leads Indian markets: Which investment created more wealth?
summary: The Nasdaq 100 emerged as the biggest long-term wealth creator over the last 20 years, with 21.3% returns. Among Indian equity benchmarks, the Nifty Midcap 150 TRI delivered the highest annualised return over the same period at 16.3%.

title: EPFO centralised database migration: Single portal for claims, digital interface, CITES project — Key features explained
summary: The Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) has this month migrated entire member database to the Centralised IT Enabled Services (CITES) project. The overhaul of its digital infrastructure aims to make services faster, transparent and more citizen centric.

title: Market trading guide: CDSL among 2 stock recommendations for Monday
summary: Markets rebounded sharply on Friday, supported by positive global cues and encouraging IT earnings. Analysts recommend CDSL and Sumitomo Chemical India as technical buy ideas, citing bullish breakouts, strong volumes and improving momentum indicators.

title: Vijay Kedia buys 3.58 lakh shares in this IT company that nearly doubled investor money
summary: Vijay Kedia-backed Kedia Securities has picked up a 3.56% stake in SME IT firm Exato Technologies, taking total holding to 9.68%. The stock has surged over 90% in a year. title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Monday
summary: The Sensex and Nifty surged over 1% on Friday, supported by TCS earnings, easing volatility and positive global cues. Investors will now track Q1 earnings, technical levels and global developments for further market direction.

title: NSE listing to "complete the trioka" and unlock value, drive governance upgrade: Report
summary: A potential NSE listing is positioned as the final step to "complete the trioka" of India's market infrastructure, with forward-looking benefits expected in transparency, valuation discovery and global index inclusion, according to a research report by Jefferies.

title: Iran moves to close Strait of Hormuz. Should investors fear a Nifty crash in coming days?
summary: Indian equities are likely to remain volatile this week as escalating tensions in West Asia and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz threaten to push crude oil prices higher. Investors will also monitor Q1 earnings, inflation data, FII flows and global risk sentiment for market direction.

title: HCL Tech Q1 preview: Revenue may dip QoQ; net profit could rise on currency depreciation
summary: HCL Technologies is expected to report a mixed performance for the June quarter, with brokerages forecasting steady year-on-year profit growth but sequential revenue weakness. Investors will closely watch AI-led demand, margins, deal wins and any changes to the company's FY27 guidance.

title: SBI MF among 6 IPOs on investors' radar this week. GMPs indicate listing gains up to 118%
summary: India's IPO market is set for another busy week with five public issues across the mainboard and SME segments. Millworks Technologies leads the grey market premium chart, while SBI Funds Management and Alpine Texworld are among the key IPOs opening for subscription.
